title: White Glint
description: Changes the enchantment glint to white.
body:
**White Enchantment Glint**

This resource pack changes the enchantment glint to a clean, white shine, giving enchanted items a more subtle and elegant look. While it stands out well on darker items, it blends more with lighter ones, making it a great choice for those who prefer a softer enchantment effect. Let me know your feedback—I’d love to get your feedback on this!
